---
title: "John Bargus Yonge"
---

## John Bargus Yonge

**Dates:** (22 Nov 1821-12 Nov 1863)

### Description

third son of the Rev. John Yonge of Puslinch

### Biography

He married (28 June 1848), his second cousin Cordelia Hay, daughter of William Hay of Dunse Castle.  He died at Biarritz. CMY wrote of his  'sullen, rather whiny temper'. [Coleridge, <i>Life</i> 65, LG]

### Letters

- Letter from July 27th [1863]
- Letter from 26 Septr 1857
- Letter from March 22d [1855]
- Letter from April 19th  [1845[[footnote:1]]]
- Letter from Decr 13th [1844]
- Letter from 25 September 1838

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
